……それで、やってきたお客様……挑戦者の人たちを<br>千切っては投げ千切っては:
So, the challengers—you've been tearing them apart left and right, a
whirlwind of activity, aren't you?
ほっほっほ。大したことはしておらんのじゃが、<br>ワシの積み重ねた魅力の前に若:
Hoh hoh hoh. I haven't done much, but it seems those young lads
can't match the charm I've built up over the years.
……どうも大暴れしてるらしいな、ジェンマ。: ...Sounds like you've been causing quite a ruckus, Gemma.
む、小僧か。まさかお主も『J』の噂を知っておるのか。:
Hmph, if it isn't the boy. Don't tell me you've heard the rumors about
'J' too?
この基地の噂ぐらい把握してるっての。<br>勝ちたい相手がいるから、いい女になる:
I keep up with the rumors around this base. You wanted to become a
good woman to defeat a certain someone, right?
そんなことまで聞いておるのか……。<br>ふん、ワシは約束は守る女じゃからな。: You even know about that... *huff*, I'm a woman who keeps her word.
それで小僧……いや、オーナー殿？<br>こうして活躍している従業員に、何かご褒美:
So, boy... no, Lord Owner? For an employee who's been working so
hard, don't you have some kind of reward?
まったく……何が望みだ？<br>俺にできることなら考えてやるよ。: Jeez... what do you want? If it's something I can do, I'll consider it.
よしよし、さすがは小僧、太っ腹じゃな。<br>ではちっと、街へと繰り出そうではな:
Good, good, just like you, boy—so generous. Well then, shall we head
into town? I'll have you be my baggage carrier again.
そのあとは１杯やって、程よく盛り上がったところで……<br>ワシがどれだけいい女:
After a drink, when we're both properly heated up... I'll show you just
what sort of woman I have become!♪
やれやれ……承知した。今夜はジェンマにとことん付き合うよ。: Oh, well... fine. Tonight I'll go along with you all the way, Gemma.
ほっほっほ、年上に付き合うのは小僧の役目じゃからな。<br>しっかりと褒美はやる:
Hoh hoh hoh, it's the boy's duty to keep an older woman company. I'll
give you a proper reward, so look forward to it!♪
